expectations.text: Recommends or clearly favors a descriptive name over the branded 'PulseIQ' as the default, with reasoning
expectations.evidence: Recommends 'Monday Brief' (descriptive) over PulseIQ with reasoning.

expectations.text: Evaluates candidates against explicit criteria (self-explanatory, say-able, collision risk, consistency with existing naming)
expectations.evidence: Explicit criteria: repeat test, describe test, crowding test, say-aloud.

expectations.text: Offers at least 3 genuinely distinct name options
expectations.evidence: Many distinct options across descriptive/cadence/delivery/synthesis angles.

expectations.text: Notes when a branded name would be justified (a flagship differentiator) rather than dismissing branding absolutely
expectations.evidence: Notes branding is justified if real 'Pulse' brand equity exists.
